message: What are you doing this deep into the forest?
Did you come to learn the secrets of magic?

Or are you looking for Thalmot?
Arvanis caused quite some trobule,
or so I've heard.
Anyway, how would you like to help me out?

Recently, goblins have settled down in the forest.
They're trying to learn magic.

Preposterous. These dark creatures,
hailing from the depths of Nimgif
should have no magical abilities of their own.
Slay them all.

Then, I'll consider teaching you some words
in the old language.
It's the language that the residents of Thalmot still speak.

After defeating the goblin mage,
you pick up its wand.
You feel a surge of power.
Good. The goblins are dead.

And you've found an item of power.
You do seem to have an affinity for it.

I'll teach you words that'll slash
your enemies to pieces.

With that, maybe you can survive
in this wilderness.
As for Thalmot, I can't help you find it.

I've forgotten the way and the mages
no longer listen to me.

Given time, maybe they'll listen to you.
I'll make no promises.

Have you come back to learn
more words of power?

I could teach you the word of strength.
It'll raises your physical abilities.

Not for free, of course.
Give me 100 coins.

You really want to learn?
Listen closely...
Good choice.
